title: Booking Payment | Ferry Ticket

tooltip.edit-button: Can edit when booking is not confirmed yet

payment-info.title: Payment detail
payment-info.payment-due-date-tooltip: Please pay the booking before the payment due date, otherwise the booking will be cancelled.

payment-methods.title: Select payment method
payment-methods.note: Please carefully review and confirm the provided information before proceeding with the ticket purchase transaction. After payment on the next page, you won't be able to change the provided information, and we won't be responsible for any mistakes.

qr-method.title: QR code
qr-method.noteContent: Transfer money to our bank account. Order will be confirmed 5 minutes after transfer.
qr-method.note-content-topup: Transfer money to our bank account. Your money will be confirmed in 5 minutes after transfer.

bankingInformation.title: Transfer information
bankingInformation.paymentCodeExpired: This payment code will expire at {{expiredDate}}

direct-method.title: Direct payment
direct-method.message: Please come directly to FERRY VN Office
direct-method.ncmkAdress: No. 5 Tran Van Hoai Street, Ninh Kieu Ward, Can Tho City

bank-transfer-method.title: Bank transfer
bank-transfer-method.noteContent: Please choose the 24/7 express transfer method and transfer to your account.

payment-fail.errorExport: An error occurred during ticket export
payment-fail.needMoreMoney: Please transfer additional funds to complete the booking

export-ticket-modal.pleaseConfirm: Please confirm before exporting the ticket
export-ticket-modal.noteConfirm: Upon selecting confirm, the system will export the ticket
export-ticket-modal.errorBookedSeatExport: One of the seats you selected has already been booked. Please go back to the seat selection step to choose another seat. Tip: You can export the passenger list to quickly re-enter the data after changing seats.
export-ticket-modal.errorDuplicateSocialId: One or more ID numbers have been used repeatedly. Please check passenger information again.
export-ticket-modal.returnBookingStep2: Return to the step of choosing a chair
export-ticket-modal.errorExport: An error occurred during ticket export
export-ticket-modal.errorProcessingIssueTicket: This booking is currently issuing a ticket, please wait.
export-ticket-modal.errorInvalidStatus: This booking cannot be re-ticketed because it has already been successfully ticketed or has been cancelled
export-ticket-modal.errorNoCustomerAttached: This booking have no customer attached
export-ticket-modal.errorOrganizationBalanceNotEnough: The balance of your organization or one of its higher-level organizations is not sufficient.
export-ticket-modal.errorOperatorIsDisabled: Unable to issue ticket due to maintenance between operator and system connection. Please try again later.
export-ticket-modal.ticket_export_error: An error occurred during ticket export. Please contact the hotline for support. Error code: {{errorCode}}
export-ticket-modal.errorUnavailableSeats: One of the seats you selected has already been booked.
export-ticket-modal.errorDuplicateSocialIdOperator: The ID number of passenger has already been used in the selected voyage:

payment.title: Payment

loader.title: Secure Payment Processing
loader.description: Please wait while we securely process your payment

payment.loading: We will redirect you to the ticket issuance page in {{second}} seconds
payment.redirect-success: We will redirect you to the booking details in {{second}} seconds

payment-response-code.card-not-enabled: Transaction failed. The issuing bank has not authorized the transaction or the card has not been activated for Internet payment services. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card for detailed support.
payment-response-code.bank-rejected: Transaction failed. The issuing bank has declined to authorize the transaction. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card to find out the exact reason for the rejection.
payment-response-code.no-bank-response: Transaction failed. The payment gateway did not receive a response from the issuing bank. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card to check the transaction status and try again.
payment-response-code.card-expired: Transaction failed due to an expired card or incorrect expiration date entered. Please verify the information and try again.
payment-response-code.insufficient-balance: Transaction failed. The card does not have sufficient limit or the account does not have enough balance to complete the payment. Please verify the information and try again.
payment-response-code.bank-processing-error: Transaction failed. An error occurred during processing at the issuing bank. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card for detailed support.
payment-response-code.transaction-error: Transaction failed. An error occurred during transaction processing. Please try again.
payment-response-code.invalid-card-number: Transaction failed. The card number is incorrect. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.invalid-card-holder: Transaction failed. The cardholder name is incorrect. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.card-locked-or-expired: Transaction failed. The card is either expired or locked. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.card-not-registered: Transaction failed. The card has not been registered for Internet payment services. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card for support.
payment-response-code.invalid-expiry-date: Transaction failed. The issue/expiry date is incorrect. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.insufficient-funds: Transaction failed. Insufficient funds to complete the payment. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.invalid-account-info: Transaction failed. The account information is incorrect. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.account-locked: Transaction failed. The account is locked. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card for support.
payment-response-code.invalid-card-info: Transaction failed. The card information is incorrect. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.invalid-otp: Transaction failed. The OTP is incorrect. Please verify and try again.
payment-response-code.payment-timeout: Transaction failed. Payment timeout occurred. Please try again.
payment-response-code.user-cancelled: Transaction failed. The user canceled the transaction.
payment-response-code.three-d-secure-auth-failed: Transaction failed due to unsuccessful 3D-Secure authentication. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card for detailed support.
payment-response-code.invalid-csc: Transaction failed due to incorrect CSC (Card Security Code) or the bank declined to authorize the transaction. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card for detailed support.
payment-response-code.three-d-secure-verification-failed: Transaction failed due to unsuccessful 3D-Secure verification. Please contact the bank using the phone number on the back of the card for detailed support.
payment-response-code.transaction-rejected: Your transaction was rejected. Please contact the merchant for support.
payment-response-code.paymentResultInvalid: Payment result is invalid. Please pay again.

error.not-found-booking-description: Sorry, we couldn't find the booking you're looking for.
error.not-found-page-description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. Maybe you typed the URL wrong? Please double-check your spelling!

bookingProcessing: Booking {{bookingId}} is still being processed. Please check back in 5 minutes.
booking-no-payment: Booking {{bookingId}} is waiting for payment. If you have already paid, please try again in 5 minutes. If you still see this message, please contact the hotline for support.

yup-error.name: Passenger name is required
yup-error.social-id-min: Social ID must be at least {{min}} characters
yup-error.social-id-max: Social ID must not exceed {{max}} characters

notification.success: Passenger information has been updated successfully
notification.error-ticket-not-found: This ticket has no more update attempts
